examples.text: فَوَيْلٌ لِّلْمُصَلِّينَ الَّذِينَ هُمْ عَن صَلَاتِهِمْ سَاهُونَ الَّذِينَ هُمْ يُرَاءُونَ وَيَمْنَعُونَ الْمَاعُونَ
examples.english: Ah, woe unto worshippers. Who are heedless of their prayer; Who would be seen (at worship) Yet refuse small kindnesses!

senses.gloss: utensil, implement, instrument; particularly, a vessel, a pot, a receptacle used in the household
ream, stack, batch, rack (particularly of paper)
